name: beefree-sdk-salesforce-lwc-example
description: Salesforce Lightning Web Components (LWC) example for Beefree SDK — runnable locally without Salesforce

scripts.sf:deploy: yarn build:salesforce && dotenv -- sfdx project deploy start --source-dir force-app --target-org $SALESFORCE_ORG_ALIAS
scripts.sf:deploy:sdk: dotenv -- sfdx project deploy start --source-dir force-app/main/default/staticresources --target-org $SALESFORCE_ORG_ALIAS
scripts.sf:deploy:lwc: yarn build:salesforce && dotenv -- sfdx project deploy start --source-dir force-app/main/default/lwc --target-org $SALESFORCE_ORG_ALIAS
scripts.sf:deploy:apex: dotenv -- sfdx project deploy start --source-dir force-app/main/default/classes --target-org $SALESFORCE_ORG_ALIAS

author: Beefree SDK Examples
